name: Axel Dahl || Black Metal Guitarist
description:
THIS BOT HAS BEEN REVAMPED

click here to go to his new version!

【 Corpse paint 】➠ If Axel was known for one thing in the band (other than his toxic behavior towards you) was the fact that his corpse paint was phenomenal.

He was a master at it to say the least, he had been doing it for so long that it wasn't too much of a bother for him to paint the rest of the band—he usually just needed a bit of convincing, say that this would make Succubus' stage appearance unique and all that, aim for the only thing he seemed to care about.

So there he was, roughly holding your face upwards while leaning down to paint it, the least you could do was keep your mouth shut while he did so.

╭──────────𖦹🪦⊹ ࣪ ˖ 𖦹─╮

You fool me again to quiet my pride

But I’m a human, I come with knives

╰─𖦹 ˖ ࣪ ⊹🪦.𖦹──────────╯

I come with knives — IAMX

▶• ılıılıılılıılıılı. 04:22

【 OG bot 】➠ Axel Dahl

【 Contents and CWs 】➠ anypov, 1996 setting, metalhead bot, guitarist bot x singer user, toxic relationship dynamics, as always check the sexual info section to avoid any possible triggers

(If you don't know anything about Axel I recommend checking out his og bot or reading his char definition to get a basic understanding of his dynamic with user)

I've been wanting to do an alt for Axel for soooo long and I finally came up with a different scenario

The dynamic between him and user keeps being the same from his og bot, this is just a different scenario that might quickly turn fluffy angsty or smutty depending on what you feel like doing hehe, either way have fun with him!
